overall.description: First-person exploration of a riverside dock and industrial settlement in a video game (resembling Red Dead Redemption 2). The player walks through a wooden shelter, passes an NPC, examines a steam-powered boat, and explores the muddy shoreline with industrial buildings emitting smoke in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock shelter with storage crates

events.description: moving from under the covered shelter toward the open dock edge
turning right to face the river and open water

agents.ego_description: walking through a wooden dock shelter toward the river

notable_agents.action: standing still near sacks of goods under the wooden shelter

entered.detail: open-sided wooden dock shelter with slatted walls and pitched roof
large weathered wooden storage crate with metal bands
stack of burlap sacks piled on the dock floor
weathered wooden dock flooring with visible grain

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a wooden dock shelter where the player passes an NPC standing near sacks of goods. The camera moves forward, exiting the sheltered area and turning toward the open river view.

scene_state.functional_zone: open river dock with panoramic water view

events.description: fully exiting the covered area into open air with full sky visibility
view opens to reveal wide river vista with distant forested shore

agents.ego_description: standing at the dock edge looking out over the calm river water

entered.detail: calm reflective water surface showing cloud reflections
tree-covered hills and rocky outcrops across the river
small wooden rowboat floating in the distance
vertical wooden post with heavy rope for docking boats

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the shelter onto the open dock, turning to face the wide river. The view opens to show calm water reflecting the partly cloudy sky, with a distant forested shore and a small boat visible on the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: dockside mooring with steam launch boat

events.description: approaching and focusing on the steam-powered boat tied to the dock
camera moves closer to examine the brass boiler and smokestack details

agents.ego_description: examining a small steam-powered launch boat tied to the dock

entered.detail: small wooden steam boat with brass boiler, smokestack, and wooden benches
vertical metal smokestack with brass fittings on the boat

segments.scene_description: The player walks along the dock to examine a small steam launch boat moored alongside. The camera focuses on the boat's brass boiler and smokestack details before beginning to turn back toward the shore.

events.description: turning back from the water to face the industrial buildings on shore
industrial complex with smoking chimneys becomes visible through the haze

agents.ego_description: walking back along the dock toward the industrial settlement

entered.detail: large timber-framed industrial building with multiple smokestacks
tall chimneys emitting black smoke against the sky
weathered wooden industrial structure with white timber framing

segments.scene_description: The player turns back from the river and walks along the dock toward an industrial settlement. Large wooden industrial buildings with smoking chimneys emerge through the morning haze, backlit by the sun.

events.description: stepping off the wooden dock onto the muddy shore
circling around the beached boat to examine it from different angles

agents.ego_description: exploring the muddy shoreline and examining a beached boat with mounted cannon

entered.detail: damaged wooden boat with mounted cannon beached on the muddy shore
wet brown mud and sand at the water's edge with puddles
weathered wooden barrel sitting on the shore

segments.scene_description: The player steps off the dock onto the muddy shore, approaching a beached wooden boat with a mounted cannon. The camera circles the wrecked vessel while the industrial buildings remain visible in the background across the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the interior of a wooden dock shelter out toward a wide river and an adjacent industrial settlement. It begins inside the shelter, passing an NPC and sacks of goods before moving forward to emerge into the open air. As the camera turns toward the river, the view expands to reveal calm, reflective waters and a distant forested shore, leading the viewer along the dock to examine the brass boiler and smokestack of a moored steam launch. The scene then shifts as the camera turns back toward the land, where large industrial buildings with smoking chimneys emerge through a sunlit morning haze. Finally, the movement carries the viewer off the dock and onto the muddy shore to circle a beached wooden boat equipped with a mounted cannon.
